title: Nia's Rainbow Feelings
synopsis: Join Nia as she discovers her feelings through colors - from red anger to blue sadness to bright yellow happiness. A gentle introduction to emotions and colors for toddlers.

pages.text: This is Nia. She feels many things every day. Her feelings have colors!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing in a swirling rainbow of soft colors representing different emotions flowing around her
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by colorful emotion swirls

pages.text: When Nia is angry, she feels RED. Red like fire. Red everywhere!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with furrowed brow, surrounded by angry red swirls and jagged shapes filling the background
illustration.alt: Angry Nia surrounded by red swirls

pages.text: When Nia is sad, she feels BLUE. Blue like rain clouds. Blue tears fall down.

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looking downward sadly, with blue rain drops and storm clouds creating a melancholy blue background
illustration.alt: Sad Nia with blue rain background

pages.text: When Nia is happy, she feels YELLOW! Yellow like sunshine. Yellow makes her smile big!

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes beaming with joy, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine rays and cheerful golden light filling the entire background
illustration.alt: Happy Nia with yellow sunshine background

pages.text: All feelings are okay. Red, blue, yellow - Nia feels them all. What colors do you feel today?

illustration.description: Nia with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with a gentle smile, standing peacefully as red, blue, and yellow colors blend harmoniously in abstract shapes around her
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by peaceful blend of emotion colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color is Nia's angry feeling?
questions.explanation: When Nia feels angry, she feels red like fire!

questions.question: What color is like sunshine when Nia is happy?
questions.explanation: Yellow is like sunshine and makes Nia smile big when she's happy!

questions.question: What does the story say about having different feelings?
questions.explanation: The story teaches us that all feelings are okay - red, blue, and yellow!
